location.office_time_required: time split across your home office, in-market site visits, and cross-functional collaboration

level_signals: Base salary range $74,800–$110,000 consistent with junior IC level

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 1–3 years of professional experience. You've succeeded operating in fast-paced, high-performance environments and exposure to local government or city planning processes.
exposure to local government or city planning processes
You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL or modeling in Excel.
You have completed your BS/BA Degree.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environments
You solve problems from first principles. You're excited to solve problems in innovative ways, and you resist "this is how it's always been done" thinking.
You'll work with a cross-functional team, including local operations, construction, real estate, vendor and category management, and warehouse design teams.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Familiarity with zoning, permitting, or entitlements is preferred.
Preferably in a relevant field such as Urban Planning, Public Policy, Environmental Policy, Real Estate Development, or a related discipline.

scope.surface: DashMart regulatory operations — site portfolio compliance, zoning, permitting, community requirements across physical locations nationally
primary_metrics_inferred: Regulatory compliance rate across site portfolio
Risk and cost reduction from regulatory issues
core_responsibilities: Support execution of regulatory workflows that enable growth while minimizing risk, cost, and timelines
Identify and track regulatory and community-related issues across site portfolio
Partner cross-functionally to support site launches and ongoing operations
Analyze data, support audits, and build processes to identify, track, and resolve issues across markets
Support development of strategies that address regulatory and community-related challenges
Translate strategies into operational improvements and pilots
Assess operational performance, identify trends and issues, use data to inform decisions

green_flags: Clear reporting structure (reports to Manager on DashMart Regulatory Operations team)
Well-defined scope and cross-functional partners named explicitly
Position fill deadline stated (6/13/2026), suggesting active and real hiring process
Hybrid model with in-market site visits offers variety and exposure
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
red_flags: No cities listed for the role despite hybrid requirement — work location is unclear
Pay range is fairly wide ($35K spread) suggesting location-based variance that is not fully explained
1–3 years experience framing is used as both a hard requirement and mixed with a 'preferred' qualifier for permitting familiarity — classification boundary is somewhat ambiguous
